shortDescription: Modern 2-bedroom suite in Scarborough Town Centre with premium finishes and full building amenities.
fullDescription: Welcome to 88 Corporate Drive, Unit 1205 in the vibrant Scarborough Town Centre neighbourhood. This well-appointed condominium suite delivers effortless urban living with premium amenities. The main living area boasts an open-concept design with pot lights and a cosy gas fireplace. The kitchen has been fully renovated with soft-close cabinetry, stone counters, and a breakfast bar. Upstairs, 2 bright bedrooms include a primary retreat with ensuite and double closets. Smart-home features, updated plumbing, and a newer roof provide peace of mind for years to come. The location is unbeatable: steps to TTC transit, acclaimed restaurants, and everyday shopping.
keyFeatures: Spacious kitchen with marble backsplash and gas range
Steps to TTC subway and streetcar
